---
@@TITLE@@
subtitle: "161.251 Regression Modelling"
date: |
  `r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y')`
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: false
    code_download: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
@@SETUP@@

# Render figures and caches beside the downloaded student file.
@@SLUG@@
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = paste0(lecture_slug, "_files/figure-html/"),
  cache.path = paste0(lecture_slug, "_cache/")
)

# xfun::embed_file() only accepts local files. Student lecture sources use
# published data URLs instead, so provide an equivalent download link.
student_embed_file <- function(path, text = basename(path), ...) {
  knitr::asis_output(sprintf(
    '<a href="%s" download="%s">%s</a>',
    path,
    basename(path),
    text
  ))
}
```

@@CONTENT@@
